name: The EXIT (Limitless Version)
description:
- - - - - @babybill888 - - - - -

The EXIT from BFB/TPOT, also including the Fourest.

Including Four, Pencil, Match, Liy, Roboty, David, Dora, 8-Ball, Stapy, and Bracelety. Firey Jr. isn’t included because whether he is or isn't a minor is controversial and depends on what you think.

I used the BFDI Wiki for the character’s personalities so blame the wiki if they’re not in-character.

Tags: bfdi, bfb, tpot, osc
creator: babybill888
